data.title: Renew Energy Global Plc reveals Q3 FY26 results, nine months' performance ended Dec 31, 2025 in India.
data.description: ReNew Energy Global Plc, based in Gurugram, India, released its unaudited consolidated IFRS results for the third quarter of the fiscal year 2026 and the nine months ending on December 31, 2025.

data.description: The current price of Litecoin stands at $54.37, accompanied by an Oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading. data.title: By late February 2026, BCH price targets $580-630 range. Short-term: $580-630, medium-term: $650-750. Bullish breakout at $583.50, support at $537.30. Crypto projection shared.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price is expected to range between $580 and $630. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), forecasts suggest a price range of $650 to $750. A bullish breakout is anticipated at the $583.50 mark, with critical support seen at $537.30. These predictions reflect current trends in the cryptocurrency market for BCH.

data.title: Aspocomp to release Financial Statement 2025 on Feb 25, 2026. CEO to host webcast at 10:00 a.m. Finnish time. Contact Manu Skyttä for more info.
data.description: Aspocomp Group Plc announced that they will publish their Financial Statement Release for the period January 1 to December 31, 2025, on February 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Finnish time. The CEO, Manu Skyttä, will present the report in a webcast starting at 10:00 a.m. Finnish time on the same day, accessible at https://aspocomp.events. The webcast will be in Finnish, with written questions accepted through the chat feature. Presentation materials in English and a recording in Finnish will be available on the company's website. Aspocomp is known for providing PCB technology design, testing, and logistics services globally, catering to companies in various sectors. They are headquartered in Espoo with a plant in Oulu, Finland. For more information, contact Manu Skyttä.

data.title: AI safety firm Anthropic doubles revenue since October, opens Bengaluru office as India becomes second-largest Claude market.
data.description: An AI safety company called Anthropic has recently expanded its operations in India by opening a new office in Bengaluru. The company has also forged partnerships with various enterprises in the region and has launched initiatives focusing on multilingual capabilities. During this expansion phase, Anthropic has witnessed a significant boost in its revenue, with the numbers doubling since October.

data.title: ATOM predicted to hit $2.67 breakout in March 2026. Short-term target $2.25, support level $2.05. Bullish forecast: $2.05-$2.67 range.
data.description: Summary of ATOM Price Prediction: In the short term, the target price for ATOM is set at $2.25 within the next week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast ranges from $2.05 to $2.67 over the course of a month. A bullish breakout is anticipated if the price reaches $2.67, while a critical support level is identified at $2.05. These figures provide valuable insights for traders and investors in the crypto market.

data.title: TERA-Award 2026 partners with UN and University of Cambridge to expand globally, adding new tracks to drive climate solutions.
data.description: In 2026, the TERA-Award is set to broaden its reach worldwide through collaborations with the United Nations and the University of Cambridge. This expansion will introduce new categories aimed at advancing innovative climate and smart energy solutions. The addition of these partners will open up opportunities for a wider range of participants to contribute to addressing pressing global challenges.

data.title: India's AI workforce experiences a 15x productivity increase with Claude.ai users finishing tasks in 15 mins - 3.8 hrs tasks. Software tasks at 45.2%.
data.description: According to the latest Anthropic Economic Index, users in India using Claude.ai are able to complete tasks that typically take 3.8 hours in just 15 minutes, surpassing the global average. The majority of these tasks, accounting for 45.2%, are related to software. This data highlights the efficiency and speed at which Indian users on Claude.ai are able to accomplish tasks compared to their counterparts worldwide.

data.title: Polkadot aims $1.50 despite obstacles; RSI at 37.53 may hinder at $1.35. Recovery possible if $1.31 support remains strong by Feb.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently at $1.35, facing a bearish trend with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 37.53. However, there is potential for a technical rebound that may drive Polkadot towards the $1.50 resistance level, provided that crucial support at $1.31 is maintained throughout February.

data.title: GLM-5 launch marks shift in AI toward engineers. Large language models now build complete systems. Strong open-source model for coding.
data.description: Singapore - GLM-5, recently made open source, represents a significant development in artificial intelligence. Large language models are now capable of more than just generating code snippets or interface prototypes; they can build complete systems and perform intricate end-to-end tasks. This progression indicates a shift from "vibe coding" to what experts refer to as agentic engineering. Designed for this advanced stage, GLM-5 is positioned as one of the most formidable open-source models for coding.

data.title: Italy's economy sees a boost as Visa data shows over 60% increase in overseas Visa cardholders' visits during the opening weekend of Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026.
data.description: In MILANO, Italy, Visa, the Official Payment Technology Partner of the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games, shared data on consumer spending in host locations during the opening weekend of the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. VisaNet data, analyzed by Visa Consulting & Analytics, highlights the positive influence of Milano Cortina 2026 on commerce. The data revealed a significant increase of over 60% in visits by overseas Visa cardholders. This indicates a strong boost in consumer activity and showcases the economic benefits of the event.

data.title: Stock buyback programme continues in multiple stock exchanges and under Danish regulatory authority and stakeholders.
data.description: The Nasdaq Copenhagen, Euronext Dublin, and London Stock Exchange, along with the Danish Financial Supervisory Authority and various other stakeholders, are intricately involved in financial transactions and oversight.
